summary: Tested all 6 UI features: (1) Leaderboard page removed - /leaderboard shows blank page, (2) Bill Payments shows 'Redeem' button, (3) Referrals page has 'View Earnings History' button, (4) New Referral Earnings History page loads correctly, (5) Bottom navigation does NOT show Leaderboard, (6) Gift Voucher page works with 'Redeem Voucher' button. All features verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js: Line 59 - Leaderboard import removed with comment '// Removed: Leaderboard (feature removed for AdMob compliance)'
App.js: Line 206 - Leaderboard route removed with comment '// Removed: Leaderboard page for AdMob compliance'
BillPayments.js: Line 521 - Button text changed from 'Submit Request' to 'Redeem'
Referrals.js: Lines 266-283 - New 'View Earnings History' button added with data-testid='view-earnings-history' that navigates to /referral-earnings
ReferralEarningsHistory.js: New page with summary cards (Total Earned, This Month, This Week, Today), Earnings by Level breakdown (L1-L5), and Earnings History section
BottomNav.js: Lines 21-26 - Only contains Home, Rewards, Play, Profile - NO Leaderboard
Sidebar.js: Line 67 - Comment '// Removed: Leaderboard for AdMob compliance' confirms Leaderboard removed from sidebar menu
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 UI changes verified: (1) /leaderboard route shows blank page (route removed from App.js), (2) Bill Payments page at /bill-payments shows 'Redeem' button instead of 'Submit Request', (3) Referrals page at /referrals has 'View Earnings History' button with data-testid='view-earnings-history', (4) New Referral Earnings History page at /referral-earnings loads with summary cards and level breakdown, (5) BottomNav.js only has Home/Rewards/Play/Profile - no Leaderboard, (6) Gift Vouchers page at /gift-vouchers works with 'Redeem Voucher' button.

leaderboard_removed.behavior: Shows blank page (route not defined in App.js)
code_changes: Sidebar.js line 67: Menu item removed with comment
